name: The Akashic Tome
pages: This book that you're likely holding in your hands is no normal book. It is an Akashic Tome, full of all sorts of information.$(br2)To switch books, punch the air with the book in your hand, then right click to select a different book.

pages.text: If you lose your tome, it's easy to make a new one... but you'll need to make all the other books from scratch.

pages: You can also add new guidebooks to the tome by putting it next to the tome in a crafting table.
